articles.title: Why Investing in DevOps Platforms Pays off for Businesses
articles.snippet: Explore why 80% of organizations are adopting Internal Developer Platforms (IDPs) by 2026. From reducing setup time by 40% to mitigating $9,000-per-minute downtime costs, discover the undeniable ROI of platform engineering, "golden paths," and built-in DevSecOps.

articles.title: Windows 11 Out‑of‑Band Update Fixes Microsoft Account Sign‑In Issues
articles.snippet: Microsoft has rolled out an out-of-band update to fix account sign-in issues in Windows 11 triggered by the March 2026 update. articles.title: How to Create and Access Shared Folders in Windows 11 (Step‑By‑Step)
articles.snippet: Windows file sharing allows any Windows PC to host a file share, making files available to other computers on the same network. articles.title: FCC Bans Foreign‑Manufactured Consumer Routers Over Security Risks
articles.snippet: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has imposed a ban on certain foreign-made consumer routers entering the United States, citing rising cybersecurity concerns. articles.title: Microsoft Defender Enhances Identity Security with AI-Driven Threat Detection and Response
articles.snippet: As cyberattacks grow faster and more identity‑driven, Microsoft is enhancing how organizations defend their digital environments.
